overall.description: Nighttime boat navigation simulation from the bridge perspective. The vessel moves slowly through calm waters while navigation displays show radar, chart, and depth data. The scene features a dark, clear night with artificial illumination from the instrument panels and deck lights.

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel from the bridge, monitoring the navigation displays while maintaining a steady course through calm waters

entered.detail: chart plotter display showing yellow landmasses on blue water
radar display with sweeping yellow beam on circular screen
depth sounder showing water column in blue and brown
forward deck of the vessel with railings and deck lights
metal railing along the port side of the bow
metal railing along the starboard side of the bow
dark water meeting the night sky at the horizon
left structural frame of the bridge window

segments.scene_description: View from the bridge of a vessel at night, showing three navigation displays mounted above the forward windows. The bow deck extends forward into the darkness with railings visible on both sides, while the radar display sweeps continuously.

events.description: camera pans right to check starboard side, temporarily shifting the view toward the right window frame

agents.ego_description: briefly panning the view to the right to check the starboard side and surroundings before returning to the forward course

entered.detail: right structural frame of the bridge window becoming visible during the pan

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right to survey the starboard side, bringing the right window frame into view and shifting the bow deck toward the left of the frame. After a brief observation, the view returns to the centered forward perspective, with the navigation displays remaining visible throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a centered bridge perspective that briefly surveys the starboard side before returning to a forward-facing view. It begins with a steady gaze through the forward windows, where three navigation displays glow above the bow deck as the radar sweeps through the surrounding darkness. As the camera pans right, the view shifts to encompass the starboard window frame, pushing the bow deck toward the left edge of the frame. The scene then smoothly pivots back toward the center, realigning the perspective with the vessel's path. Finally, the shot settles back into the original forward orientation, with the illuminated instrument panels remaining constant against the night sky.
